message:
feat(types): Expand type system with comprehensive Zod schemas

This commit represents a major expansion of the type system from ~80 lines
to 516+ lines, establishing the foundational contracts for the entire
cass-memory system.

## Changes Overview

### Zod Schema Integration
- Added `zod` import for runtime validation and LLM structured output
- All interfaces now have corresponding Zod schemas for:
  - Runtime type validation
  - LLM generateObject() integration
  - YAML parsing validation

### New Enum Types (with Zod schemas)
- `HarmfulReasonEnum`: caused_bug, wasted_time, contradicted_requirements,
  wrong_context, outdated, other
- `SessionStatusEnum`: success, failure, mixed
- `BulletScopeEnum`: global, workspace, language, framework, task
- `BulletTypeEnum`: rule, anti-pattern
- `BulletKindEnum`: project_convention, stack_pattern, workflow_rule, anti_pattern
- `BulletStateEnum`: draft, active, retired
- `BulletMaturityEnum`: candidate, established, proven, deprecated
- `LLMProviderEnum`: openai, anthropic, google

### FeedbackEvent Schema (Critical for P1 Confidence Decay)
```typescript
FeedbackEventSchema = z.object({
  type: z.enum(['helpful', 'harmful']),
  timestamp: z.string(),  // ISO 8601
  sessionPath: z.string().optional(),
  reason: HarmfulReasonEnum.optional(),
  context: z.string().optional(),
  decayedValue: z.number().optional()  // Cached decay calculation
})
```

### Enhanced PlaybookBullet
- Added all P1-P14 priority fields from implementation plan
- Includes verification field for code-based validation
- derivedFrom field for evidence chain tracking
- pinned/pinnedReason for protected rules

### CassSearchHit (renamed from CassHit)
- Clearer naming convention
- Schema for cass CLI search result parsing

### Config Schema
- Full configuration interface with all settings
- Provider settings, path settings, thresholds
- Feature flags and sanitization config

## Why This Matters
- Single source of truth for all types
- Enables type-safe LLM structured output
- Foundation for all other modules (scoring, playbook, cass, llm)
- Prevents type drift between modules

## Breaking Changes
- `CassHit` renamed to `CassSearchHit`
- Modules importing types need to update imports

Implements: cass_memory_system-5eh.2 (Type System)
Related: P1 (Confidence Decay), P10 (State Lifecycle), P14 (Kind Enum)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
